data.title: Visa announces expansion of its stablecoin business into Central and Eastern Europe, the Middle East and Africa
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Payment card giant Visa announced that it has expanded its stablecoin business to Central Europe, Eastern Europe, the Middle East and Africa (CEMEA) and has established a strategic partnership with African cryptocurrency exchange Yellow Card. Godfrey Sullivan, Visa senior vice president and head of CEMEA products and solutions, said in a statement: "By 2025, we believe that every institution that transfers money will need a stablecoin strategy." (CoinDesk)

data.title: Bitget has launched UNI, AVAX, and BCH perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched currency-based UNI, AVAX, and BCH perpetual contracts, with leverage ranges of 1-25 times.

data.title: Visa Expands Stablecoin Operations to New Regions
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Visa has expanded its stablecoin operations to Central and Eastern Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. The payment card giant has formed a strategic partnership with African cryptocurrency exchange Yellow Card. Visa is increasingly investing in stablecoins, which are rapidly becoming a new infrastructure for internet payments. Last month, Visa also invested in BVNK, a company focused on stablecoin-based payments.

data.title: South Korea Plans Roadmap for Bitcoin Spot ETF Launch
data.description: According to PANews, the South Korean Financial Services Commission is developing a roadmap for the introduction of a Bitcoin spot ETF. This initiative aims to provide investors with more options in the cryptocurrency market, reflecting a growing interest in digital assets. The move is part of broader efforts to integrate cryptocurrency into the financial system, ensuring regulatory compliance and investor protection.

data.title: From CSE to Nasdaq: Sol Strategies Accelerates Solana Staking Vision
data.description:
Sol Strategies, a major Solana-focused Canadian firm, has filed with the SEC to list its shares on Nasdaq, signaling expansion ambitions.

The post From CSE to Nasdaq: Sol Strategies Accelerates Solana Staking Vision first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/06/19/sol-strategies-files-for-nasdaq-listing/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=sol-strategies-files-for-nasdaq-listing

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant: The passage of the GENIUS Act will make the prospects of the stablecoin market brighter
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant said in a post on the X platform that recent reports predict that the stablecoin market could reach $3.7 trillion by the end of the next decade. With the passage of the GENIUS Act, the prospects for the stablecoin market will be brighter. The stablecoin ecosystem will drive private sector demand for U.S. Treasuries, which are the backing of stablecoins. This new demand is expected to reduce government borrowing costs and help control national debt. It may also attract millions of new users to join the dollar-based digital asset economy worldwide. This is a win-win situation for all participants.

data.title: Suspected LayerZero team/investor wallet deposited 2 million ZRO into Binance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a suspected LayerZero team/investor wallet deposited 2 million ZRO into Binance, worth US$3.615 million. These tokens were received more than a year ago. The wallet currently holds 4 million ZRO, worth US$7.23 million.

data.title: Stablecoin Market Projected to Reach $3.7 Trillion by 2035
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant recently shared on the X platform that reports predict the stablecoin market could reach $3.7 trillion by the end of the next decade. The passage of the GENIUS Act is expected to enhance the outlook for the stablecoin market. The stablecoin ecosystem is anticipated to drive private sector demand for U.S. Treasury bonds, which underpin stablecoins. This new demand is likely to reduce government borrowing costs and help manage national debt, while potentially attracting millions of new users globally to the dollar-based digital asset economy. This scenario presents a win-win situation for all involved.

data.title: Gate Launches NEWT Perpetual Contract Pre-Market Trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate will launch NEWT perpetual contract pre-market trading (USDT settlement) at 22:35 (UTC+8) on June 19, supporting 1-10 times leverage.

data.title: 7 Votes Saved Czech Government from Being Ousted Over Bitcoin-Related Scandal
data.description:

data.title: Binance Alpha Points Update: slisBNB and clisBNB will be counted towards users’ holding points
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, starting from 8 am on June 20 (Eastern Time 8), Staked Lista BNB (slisBNB) and Lista collateral BNB (clisBNB) in the decentralized BNB assets will be counted into the user's Binance Alpha holding points.

data.title: Kraken launches Bitcoin staking with Babylon integration
data.description:
Kraken has launched a Bitcoin staking service in partnership with Babylon, allowing users to earn BABY tokens.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/kraken-launches-bitcoin-staking-babylon?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Fireblocks: Survey shows that 49% of surveyed institutions have used stablecoins for payments
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fireblocks, a digital asset infrastructure provider, published an article on the X platform stating that according to its "2025 Stablecoin Status" report data, the survey showed that 49% of the surveyed institutions have used stablecoins for payments, and 41% of the institutions are piloting or planning to use stablecoins.

data.title: Data: BTC reserves of listed companies have exceeded 768,500, worth more than $82 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Bitcoin Magazine Pro published an article on the X platform to disclose data, and the current Bitcoin treasury reserves of listed companies have exceeded 768,500 pieces, with a value of over 82 billion US dollars.

data.title: Corporate Bitcoin Holdings Surpass 768,500 Coins, Valued Over $82 Billion
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitcoin Magazine Pro has revealed on the X platform that publicly traded companies now hold more than 768,500 bitcoins in their reserves, with a total value exceeding $82 billion.

data.title: Trump family pulls silent exit from high-stakes venture, cuts 20% stake
data.description:
Donald Trump’s company reduces stake in World Liberty Financial from 60% to 40%.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/trump-family-pulls-silent-exit-from-high-stakes-venture-cuts-20-stake
